caption: A person with short blonde hair and a dark blue t-shirt is featured in a small inset window while playing a football game in "MADDEN NFL 23". The gameplay footage shows a football field with athletes in white and dark uniforms. The scoreboard displays "7" and "2nd" with a timer showing "2:25" and "35" initially, which later changes to "2:17" and "29" with a play clock of ":23" and the text "1st & 10". The person in the inset window is seen speaking and later reacts with a focused expression. In one section of the footage, the person's face is overlaid with a colorful clown wig and a red nose over a background of multicolored vertical test bars. On-screen text in the bottom right corner reads "FEARLESS GOOD ACCURACY BULLET PASS". Logos for "UT" and "ULTIMATE TEAM" are visible in the stadium backgrounds.
